title: LICHEN_LORA_FRAME_OVERHEAD magic number 55 not fully derived from constants
description:
Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lora_l2.h:56 

LICHEN_LORA_FRAME_OVERHEAD = 55 is defined as a magic number with a comment explaining the derivation:
  Max LoRa payload at SF10/BW125:     255 bytes
  LICHEN frame overhead:               ~10 bytes 
  Schnorr-48 signature:                 48 bytes
  Margin for SCHC rule ID:               ~2 bytes
  = ~60 overhead, but constant is 55

Risk: 
1. The derivation in the comment does not match 55 (10+48+2 = 60, not 55)
2. BUILD_ASSERTs in lichen_l2.c verify LICHEN_SIG_LEN == 48 and base overhead == 9, but do not verify the complete 55
3. If any component changes, manual recalculation is required

Pattern contributors may copy incorrectly: Changing LICHEN_SIG_LEN but not updating this constant, or vice versa.

Suggested fix: Define LICHEN_LORA_FRAME_OVERHEAD as an expression:
#define LICHEN_LORA_FRAME_OVERHEAD (LICHEN_FRAME_BASE_OVERHEAD + LICHEN_SIG_LEN - margin)
Or add a BUILD_ASSERT that validates the relationship.
